what: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
text: nychex provides tessellated hexagonal square tile maps New York City administrative geographies. polygon source geography represented single tile, arranged approximate overall spatial layout city.

title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
text: can install development version nychex GitHub : Alternatively, install package r-universe: Including https://cloud.r-project.org ensures dependencies CRAN resolved automatically.

title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
text: Borough outlines also available via nyc_nta_boros_hex_sf, separate outlines Brooklyn Queens:
code: library(ggplot2) library(nychex)  ggplot(nyc_nta20_hex_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = boro_name), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough") +   theme_void() ggplot(nyc_nta20_hex_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = boro_name), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +   geom_sf_text(aes(label = nta_abbrev), size = 1.8) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough") +   theme_void() ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_nta20_hex_sf,     aes(fill = boro_name),     color = "white",     linewidth = 0.2,     alpha = 0.3   ) +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_nta_boros_hex_sf,     aes(color = boro_name),     fill = NA,     linewidth = 0.8   ) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough", color = "Borough") +   theme_void()

title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
text: census tract level hex map also available via nyc_ct20_hex_sf (2,325 tracts), borough outlines nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf:
code: ggplot(nyc_ct20_hex_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = boro_name), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough") +   theme_void() ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_ct20_hex_sf,     aes(fill = boro_name),     color = "white",     linewidth = 0.2,     alpha = 0.3   ) +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf,     aes(color = boro_name),     fill = NA,     linewidth = 0.8   ) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough", color = "Borough") +   theme_void()

title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies
text: square tile variant available via nyc_nta20_sq_sf:  Borough outlines square map available via nyc_nta_boros_sq_sf:
code: ggplot(nyc_nta20_sq_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = boro_name), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough") +   theme_void() ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_nta20_sq_sf,     aes(fill = boro_name),     color = "white",     linewidth = 0.2,     alpha = 0.3   ) +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_nta_boros_sq_sf,     aes(color = boro_name),     fill = NA,     linewidth = 0.8   ) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough", color = "Borough") +   theme_void()

title: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies

code: ggplot(nyc_ct20_sq_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = boro_name), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough") +   theme_void() ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_ct20_sq_sf,     aes(fill = boro_name),     color = "white",     linewidth = 0.2,     alpha = 0.3   ) +   geom_sf(     data = nyc_ct_boros_sq_sf,     aes(color = boro_name),     fill = NA,     linewidth = 0.8   ) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(fill = "Borough", color = "Borough") +   theme_void()

what: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
text: tessellated hexagonal tile map 2,325 New York City 2020 census tracts. tract represented single hexagonal polygon tile, arranged approximate geographic layout city.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
text: simple feature collection 2325 rows 9 columns: geoid Census GEOID (state + county + tract FIPS code). Use column joining tract-level data. boro_ct2020 Unique borough-tract identifier (borough code concatenated tract code). ct2020 Census tract 2020 code (unique across boroughs). boro_code Borough code. 1 = Manhattan, 2 = Bronx, 3 = Brooklyn, 4 = Queens, 5 = Staten Island. boro_name Borough name. nta2020 NTA 2020 identifier tract. nta_name Full NTA name. puma Public Use Microdata Area code. tile_map POLYGON hexagonal tile geometry (EPSG:2263).

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
text: Derived census tract 2020 boundaries nycmaps package using tilemaps algorithm.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
text: hex map generated using tilemaps algorithm applied borough separately (Manhattan, Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island), rescaled uniform hex size assembled preserve NYC's overall geographic layout. Unlike NTA hex map, Brooklyn Queens tiled separate boroughs rather combined, visible gap . Island tracts (geographically disconnected NTAs become disconnected polygon simplification) included individual small-group tiles positioned near geographic locations. Multi-tract island NTAs (e.g. Rockaways, City Island) tiled contiguous groups possible.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_hex_sf
text: Kieran Healy

what: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
title: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
text: tessellated square tile map 2,325 New York City 2020 census tracts. tract represented single square polygon tile, arranged approximate geographic layout city.

title: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
text: simple feature collection 2325 rows 9 columns: geoid Census GEOID (state + county + tract FIPS code). Use column joining tract-level data. boro_ct2020 Unique borough-tract identifier (borough code concatenated tract code). ct2020 Census tract 2020 code (unique across boroughs). boro_code Borough code. 1 = Manhattan, 2 = Bronx, 3 = Brooklyn, 4 = Queens, 5 = Staten Island. boro_name Borough name. nta2020 NTA 2020 identifier tract. nta_name Full NTA name. puma Public Use Microdata Area code. tile_map POLYGON square tile geometry (EPSG:2263).

title: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
text: Derived census tract 2020 boundaries nycmaps package using tilemaps algorithm.

title: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
text: square tile map generated using tilemaps algorithm square = TRUE, applied borough separately (Manhattan, Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island), rescaled uniform tile size assembled preserve NYC's overall geographic layout. Unlike NTA square map, Brooklyn Queens tiled separate boroughs rather combined, visible gap . Island tracts (geographically disconnected NTAs become disconnected polygon simplification) included individual small-group tiles positioned near geographic locations. Multi-tract island NTAs (e.g. Rockaways, City Island) tiled contiguous groups possible.

title: Square tile map of NYC census tracts (2020) — nyc_ct20_sq_sf
text: Kieran Healy

what: Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
title: Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
text: Polygon outlines main contiguous hex area NYC borough, derived nyc_ct20_hex_sf. Disconnected island hexes excluded. Brooklyn Queens separate outlines, shared border visible.

title: Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
text: simple feature collection 5 rows 3 columns: boro_name Borough name. boro_code Borough code. 1 = Manhattan, 2 = Bronx, 3 = Brooklyn, 4 = Queens, 5 = Staten Island. tile_map POLYGON outline geometry (EPSG:2263).

title: Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
text: Derived nyc_ct20_hex_sf unioning hex tiles per borough extracting largest polygon.

title: Borough outlines for the NYC census tract 2020 hex map — nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf
text: Kieran Healy

what: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
text: tessellated hexagonal tile map New York City's 262 Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (NTA 2020). NTA represented single hexagonal polygon tile, arranged approximate geographic layout city.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
text: simple feature collection 262 rows 12 columns: boro_code Borough code. 1 = Manhattan, 2 = Bronx, 3 = Brooklyn, 4 = Queens, 5 = Staten Island. county_fips County FIPS code. nta_name Full NTA name. nta2020 NTA 2020 identifier. boro_name Borough name. nta_type NTA type (residential non-residential). cdta2020 Community District Tabulation Area 2020 identifier. cdta_name Full CDTA name. shape_leng Perimeter length original NTA boundary. nta_abbrev Abbreviated NTA name. shape_area Area original NTA boundary. tile_map POLYGON hexagonal tile geometry (EPSG:2263).

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
text: Derived NTA 2020 boundaries nycmaps package using tilemaps algorithm.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
text: hex map generated using tilemaps algorithm applied borough groups separately (Manhattan, Bronx, Brooklyn/Queens, Staten Island), rescaled uniform hex size assembled preserve NYC's overall geographic layout. Island NTAs added back using tilemaps::create_island() positioned approximate geographic locations.

title: Hexagonal tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_hex_sf
text: Kieran Healy

text: simple feature collection 262 rows 12 columns: boro_code Borough code. 1 = Manhattan, 2 = Bronx, 3 = Brooklyn, 4 = Queens, 5 = Staten Island. county_fips County FIPS code. nta_name Full NTA name. nta2020 NTA 2020 identifier. boro_name Borough name. nta_type NTA type (residential non-residential). cdta2020 Community District Tabulation Area 2020 identifier. cdta_name Full CDTA name. shape_leng Perimeter length original NTA boundary. nta_abbrev Abbreviated NTA name. shape_area Area original NTA boundary. tile_map POLYGON square tile geometry (EPSG:2263).

title: Square tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_sq_sf
text: Derived NTA 2020 boundaries nycmaps package using tilemaps algorithm.

title: Square tile map of NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (2020) — nyc_nta20_sq_sf
text: square tile map generated using tilemaps algorithm square = TRUE, applied borough groups separately (Manhattan, Bronx, Brooklyn/Queens, Staten Island), rescaled uniform tile size assembled preserve NYC's overall geographic layout. Island NTAs added back using tilemaps::create_island() positioned approximate geographic locations.

what: nychex: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies — nychex-package
title: nychex: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies — nychex-package
text: Provides sf objects containing hexagonal square tile maps New York City administrative geographies. polygon source geography represented single tile, preserving overall spatial layout city.

title: nychex: Tessellated Hex Maps for New York City Geographies — nychex-package
text: Maintainer: Kieran Healy kjhealy@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: nychex 0.3.0
text: Added nyc_nta20_sq_sf: square tile map 262 NTA 2020 boundaries five NYC boroughs, using assembly approach hex map square = TRUE. Added nyc_nta_boros_sq_sf: borough outline polygons NTA square tile map. Added nyc_ct20_sq_sf: square tile map 2,271 census tracts (2020) five NYC boroughs. Brooklyn Queens tiled separate boroughs. Added nyc_ct_boros_sq_sf: borough outline polygons census tract square tile map. nyc_ct20_hex_sf now includes 2,325 census tracts (previously 2,271). 54 island disconnected tracts added individual small-group tiles positioned near geographic locations. nyc_ct20_sq_sf now includes 2,325 census tracts (previously 2,271), island tracts handled way.

title: nychex 0.2.0
text: Added nyc_ct20_hex_sf: hexagonal tile map 2,271 census tracts (2020) five NYC boroughs. Brooklyn Queens tiled separate boroughs. Added nyc_ct_boros_hex_sf: borough outline polygons census tract hex map. Renamed nyc_boro_hex_outlines_sf nyc_nta_boros_hex_sf consistency new census tract outlines object.

title: nychex 0.1.0
text: Added nyc_nta20_hex_sf: hexagonal tile map 262 NTA 2020 boundaries five NYC boroughs. Added nyc_boro_hex_outlines_sf: borough outline polygons derived hex tile map, separate outlines Brooklyn Queens.
